parts.text:
The image shows a **carpenter ant** (*Camponotus flavomarginatus*).

It is a member of the genus *Camponotus*, which are commonly known as carpenter ants. This specific species is characterized by its distinct reddish-brown body with a darker, often blackish abdomen. You can see the ant’s segmented body, antennae, and legs in sharp detail against a plain background.
